contract: {rating, notes} — exactly two keys, rating int 0-100, notes non-empty, one bare JSON object
comment: schema_cases run with NO model (pure Python via sysdesign_spec.schema_ok) and MUST pass exactly as marked — the deterministic forcing function for output shape. band_cases are the labeled held-out examples; the runner checks the reference oracle lands in band (a known-good baseline) and that an empty emission scores 0.0 (cannot saturate). A live agent's recorded outputs can be checked the same way once a run exists. Prose is never compared.

output.notes: No problems found through the system-design lens; no change needed.
total() loads every order then scans for one id, a full-collection fetch that bottlenecks at 100x data; replace with an indexed repo.get(order_id) to reach 100.
